channel.title: Security Engineering on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB
channel.description: Recent content in Security Engineering on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB

item.title: Automated Domain Blocking via Batch Scripting
item.description: Objective: To develop a reusable and scalable automation tool for neutralizing network threats at the system level.

item.title: DOM-Based Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Analysis
item.description: Objective: To identify and exploit an unsafe JavaScript “sink” to execute arbitrary code in the victim’s browser context.

item.title: Engineered Security Lab Deployment & Troubleshooting
item.description: Objective: To design, configure, and maintain a virtualized security testing environment for controlled vulnerability assessment.
